name: cyber-nexus-elite-portfolio
description: High-end glassmorphic UI matrix interface with dynamic view switching orchestration pipelines.
author: PVP_PRO

scripts.prebuild: echo '=== INITIALIZING MATRIX SYSTEM BUILD CONFIGURATION ==='
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r index.html assets vercel.json dist/ 2>/dev/null || (xcopy index.html dist\ /E /I /Y && xcopy assets dist\assets\ /E /I /Y && xcopy vercel.json dist\ /Y)
scripts.postbuild: echo '=== SYSTEM BUILD COMPILED SUCCESSFULLY TO /DIST ==='
scripts.start: echo 'Production Matrix Online. Point web root execution to index.html or target the static build distribution directly.'
